justification: All 7 ACs implemented and mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage. Collect-all-errors pattern explicitly used (not fail-fast). AC5 conditional required (express only) and AC6 conditional forbidden (standard) are distinct and correctly scoped. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. AC7 tested with multi-failure requests (missing name + negative weight, and a three-error scenario). 15 tests cover all 7 ACs including boundary values. No external validation library.

observations.text: AC5 and AC6 correctly distinguished — saturday_delivery: false treated as 'provided', so AC5 passes but AC6 still fires for standard shipments
AC7 uses toHaveLength assertions to confirm exact error counts, not just presence checks
Boundary testing for weight_kg (0, 1000, 1001) and whitespace-only recipient_name goes beyond minimum requirements
Three-error scenario test strengthens AC7 coverage beyond the two-error minimum
